summary: Governed example rescue task that fixes identity, leakage boundaries, and the required governance artifacts before downstream rescue data freezes or implementations ship.

artifact_contracts.description: Registry-backed rescue candidate universe and pre-cutoff features.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be materialized from rescue evidence frozen on or before the rescue cutoff and must exclude post-cutoff outcomes or later source refreshes.

artifact_contracts.description: Post-cutoff rescue outcomes used only for task evaluation.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May close after the rescue cutoff but must never be exposed to feature construction, ranking, or threshold selection.

artifact_contracts.description: Ordered rescue predictions emitted by a future rescue runner.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be derived only from ranking inputs allowed by this contract and must not embed hidden evaluation labels or post-cutoff features.

artifact_contracts.description: Operator-supplied metadata documenting intended cutoff and cohort scope.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May describe task scope and cutoff intent but must not summarize post-cutoff outcome adjudications.

leakage_boundary.notes: Rescue tasks now require schema-validated dataset cards, task cards, freeze manifests, split manifests, and raw-to-frozen lineage before downstream freeze work can consume the lane.

notes: This example rescue task remains separate from the benchmark registry-backed scz_translational_task and now points at a schema-validated governance bundle under data/curated/rescue_tasks/governance/.
